title: dracaena neobella
intro: Dracaena neobella, also known as the Corn Plant, is a species of flowering plant in the family Asparagaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it beneficial in treating various health issues. The plant is also known to provide several health benefits, including reducing stress and anxiety, improving air quality by purifying the air, and promoting better sleep. The herbal preparations of the Dracaena neobella plant are typically used in the form of teas, infusions, or extracts, and are often used to treat respiratory issues and other health conditions.
